'''Iskadrell''', also known as '''Iskallon''',<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Iskallon system/Legends|Iskallon system]] of the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Iskalloni]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]].<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira" /> It was [[Raid on Iskadrell|raided]] by [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] shortly prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].<ref name="KOTOR 48">[[Knights of the Old Republic 48|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 48]]</ref>

Iskadrell was isolated from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], with only one known [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] leading to its [[Star system/Legends|system]]. This route led to the [[Brevost system/Legends|Brevost system]] on the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]], and took thirteen days to travel. However, the Iskalloni did have [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped [[Starship/Legends|starships]], and made occasional [[Slavery/Legends|slave]]-raiding expeditions into the "civilized" galaxy.<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira" />

When [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] and emissaries from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] first encountered the Iskalloni, they attempted to form a slave-trading alliance. However, rather than supply slaves to the Empire, the Iskalloni decided to enslave the Imperial emissaries instead. The [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] sent three [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] for a retaliatory raid. Though the Imperials devastated much of the planet before the Iskallon counterattack, the Imperial forces were forced to retreat.<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira" />

Since they were not pursued, the Empire no longer saw the Iskalloni as a major threat. Indeed, the Iskalloni kept a low profile for some time, only picking up activities after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira" />
